productDisplayName: Nike Men Solid Navy Blue Sweatshirts
description: CompositionNavy blue hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hoodie with drawstring, ribbed panels on the sides, zippered closure on the front, patch pockets on the sides of the zipper, embroidered swoosh logo on the upper left chest and a ribbed hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not dry cleanDo not bleachTumble dry on lowWarm iron onlyDo not iron on print or embroideryThis black hooded jacket from nike is inspired by classic street style staples. The ribbed panels on the sides add discreet styling, while the thick fabric along with the hoodie gives extra insulation. Team this with tees and jeans.
